content: The intrinsic reward signals used to rank curiosity in ICM/RND curiosity-driven reinforcement learning can be repurposed as a dynamic memory pruning metric for 2024–2025 SOTA active learning agent memory, where only unexpected, high-curiosity state observations are retained in long-term episodic memory instead of pruning by recency or prediction loss. This creates a self-sustaining loop where an agent’s intrinsic curiosity actively shapes the memory it uses to explore new, unlabeled data in active learning.
source_topics: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
trigger_topic: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
